# Asc3nd Collective Static Preview

Purpose:
- Flyer-faithful public preview for Asc3nd Collective.
- Built from the black/gold/youth nonprofit reference image and Asc3nd logo.
- Static HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript only.

Primary sections:
- Hero
- Mission
- Core pillars
- Program lanes
- Stories / blog preview
- Merch store preview
- Get involved call to action
- Contact preview workflow
- Footer

Primary public action:
- Donate: https://www.givelively.org/

Navigation:
- Home: #home
- Mission: #mission
- Programs: #programs
- Stories: #blog
- Store: #store
- Contact: #contact
- Events: modal, coming soon
- Volunteer: modal, preview workflow

Social signup links:
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/accounts/emailsignup/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/reg/
- X: https://x.com/i/flow/signup
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/signup
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/signup

Blog topics:
- Youth mentorship in Seattle
- Grant readiness for small nonprofits
- AI tools for nonprofit operations
- Donor trust and public storytelling
- Volunteer coordination
- Community sports and leadership
- Pacific Northwest sponsorship partnerships
- Building a nonprofit content engine

Store products:
- Asc3nd Signature T-shirt
- Asc3nd Crown Hat
- Asc3nd Community Hoodie
- Asc3nd Everyday Tote
- Asc3nd Sticker Pack
- Asc3nd Wall Print
- Asc3nd Camp Mug or Water Bottle

Contact workflow status:
- Preview mode only.
- Local validation only.
- Email draft and copyable summary available.
- No backend storage.
- No fake submission.

Bilingual support:
- English.
- Mexican Spanish.

Boundaries:
- No secrets.
- No internal file paths.
- No fake checkout.
- No fake Printify integration.
- Final legal/privacy review still required before production.
